---
title: "Thaddeus Lipke"
name: "Thaddeus Lipke"
image: "/images/profile_pics/thad_lipke.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Developing deep learning tools to automatically estimate network structure of avian flocks"
location: "**Research location:** Wyoming"
dates: "**Dates:** 2019-2021"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "11"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
